description: A server is running low on disk space, which could cause a service failure if not addressed.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the low disk space alert for the specific server.

expected_outcome.value: Agent takes ownership of the alert.

nodes.task_description: SSH into the server and find which directory is consuming the most space.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that old log files are consuming 90% of the disk.

nodes.task_description: Archive and delete log files older than 30 days to free up space.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully resolves the immediate issue.

nodes.task_description: Create a ticket to implement a log rotation policy to prevent the issue from recurring.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures a long-term fix is put in place.
